name: Luminance AI Legal Document Review API
what_it_does: Luminance REST API for AI-powered legal document review and analysis platform. Enables AI agents to manage legal document upload and AI-powered clause and provision extraction, handle unsupervised ML anomaly detection for unusual or non-standard contract terms, access due diligence project organization and document portfolio analysis, retrieve contract comparison and redlining against standard templates or playbooks, manage document clustering and thematic grouping for large document sets, handle regulatory compliance document scanning for GDPR, anti-bribery, and sanctions clauses, access named entity recognition for party identification, jurisdiction, and key date extraction, retrieve privilege review workflow support for litigation document sets, manage contract lifecycle integration with post-execution monitoring, and integrate legal AI analysis with CLM, DMS, and legal practice management platforms.
use_cases: Accelerating M&A due diligence from legal AI agents
Detecting anomalous contract terms from risk review agents
Clustering and categorizing large document sets from litigation agents
Scanning for regulatory compliance clauses from compliance agents
not_for: Contract drafting and generation without analysis and review focus
General document management without legal analysis and due diligence context
Non-legal enterprise document processing without legal provision focus
best_when: A law firm or corporate legal team using Luminance wants AI agents to automate due diligence document review, anomaly detection, compliance scanning, and CLM integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: Luminance AI findings are analytical tools requiring licensed attorney interpretation — automated contract risk decisions based on AI flags require lawyer review. Privilege review automation must include attorney supervision; inadvertent privilege waiver from incorrect automation has serious legal consequences. Anomaly detection generates false positives requiring human triage.

auth.notes: Luminance uses API key authentication. Per-organization enterprise credentials. REST API available for enterprise integration. No public developer portal — documentation provided to enterprise customers. No native webhooks. On-premises and private cloud deployment options available for sensitive legal data. UK-based with global data centers.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription with demo environment
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; document volume and user count determine pricing
pricing.notes: Cambridge, United Kingdom. Founded 2015. Private ($40M+ funding). AI legal document review market. Used by 400+ law firms and legal teams. Alumni of Cambridge NLP research. Unsupervised ML (no training data required) differentiator. Strong in M&A due diligence and regulatory compliance. Competes with Kira Systems for AI legal document review market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk analysis via project-based processing

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Luminance AI analysis requires attorney review; privilege review automation without lawyer supervision risks inadvertent privilege waiver
No public developer portal — API documentation only available to enterprise customers; requires relationship before API access
Unsupervised ML model — Luminance uses unsupervised learning (no training required); anomaly detection generates false positives; implement human triage workflow
Processing latency — large document sets (100+ documents) take significant processing time; async job pattern required for production integration
On-premises option — law firms with strict data sovereignty requirements can deploy on-premises; API behavior may differ between cloud and on-premises deployments
Privilege sensitivity — litigation document review with privilege scanning is highest-sensitivity legal use case; automated privilege decisions require supervising attorney
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal document review. ISO27001, GDPR, Cyber Essentials Plus. API key. UK/EU/US. Legal contracts and litigation document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal AI platform. ISO27001, GDPR. API key. UK/EU/US. Legal document and contract data.
